mapper.sql: id, enterprise_name, credit_code, contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone, apply_ip, apply_no, apply_time, audit_status, audit_user_id, audit_time, audit_remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ent_registration WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM ent_registration WHERE deleted = 0
AND enterprise_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{enterpriseName}, '%')
AND credit_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{creditCode}, '%')
AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ent_registration ( enterprise_name, credit_code, contact_person, contact_email, contact_phone, apply_ip, apply_no, apply_time, audit_status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{enterpriseName}, #{creditCode}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{applyIp}, #{applyNo}, #{applyTime}, #{auditStatus}, #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ent_registration
enterprise_name = #{enterpriseName}, credit_code = #{creditCode}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_email = #{contactEmail}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_time = #{auditTime}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE ent_registration SET deleted = 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
